creator: herbert@laubners.info
text:
I just encountered the problem. 
I am building a desptop-version, using poudriere in a jail to build the packages to my liking. 

I tried it with openmp in my pkglist
cat /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/pkglist 
devel/openmp
www/firefox
x11/nvidia-driver
ports-mgmt/pkg
ports-mgmt/poudriere
sysutils/smartmontools
mail/thunderbird
x11-wm/xfce4
x11/xorg
editors/vim-console
graphics/gimp
graphics/darktable
german/libreoffice
deskutils/calibre
editors/linux-sublime3
print/hplip
audio/xfce4-pulseaudio-plugin
deskutils/xfce4-notifyd
deskutils/xfce4-volumed-pulse
misc/xfce4-weather-plugin
print/xfce4-print
x11/libxfce4menu
x11/xfce4-goodies
x11-toolkits/libxfce4gui
print/texlive-full
print/latex-resume

I as well placed in into my make.conf, after it failed
OPTIONS_UNSET= DEBUG HELP STATIC GNUTLS DOCS EXAMPLES \
           MANPAGES DOCBOOK TESTS HTMLDOCS JACK CPU_CLIP
OPTIONS_SET=SOUND ALSA PULSEAUDIO CUPS READLINE X11 OPENGL OPENMP

The result is the same. Here the log:

---Begin make.conf---
USE_PACKAGE_DEPENDS=yes
BATCH=yes
WRKDIRPREFIX=/wrkdirs
PORTSDIR=/usr/ports
PACKAGES=/packages
DISTDIR=/distfiles
FORCE_PACKAGE=yes
PACKAGE_BUILDING=yes
PACKAGE_BUILDING_FLAVORS=yes
#### /usr/local/etc/poudriere.d/make.conf ####
CC=clang             # Highly recommended over GCC,
CXX=clang++          # but only needed for 8.X and 9.X
CPP=clang-cpp        # since it's the default in 10.0

OPTIONS_UNSET= DEBUG HELP STATIC GNUTLS DOCS EXAMPLES \
           MANPAGES DOCBOOK TESTS HTMLDOCS JACK CPU_CLIP
OPTIONS_SET=SOUND ALSA PULSEAUDIO CUPS READLINE X11 OPENGL OPENMP




 ---- snip ------


/bin/sh ../../libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=link clang -I/usr/local/include/glib-2.0 -I/usr/local/lib/glib-2.0/include -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/local/include/json-glib-1.0 -I/usr/local/include/gio-unix-2.0/ -pthread  -I/usr/local/include/babl-0.1  -I/usr/local/include/libraw -I/usr/local/include  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -mmmx -msse -ffast-math -Wall -Wdeclaration-after-statement -Wmissing-prototypes -Wmissing-declarations -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wold-style-definition -avoid-version -export-dynamic -module  -fstack-protector  -o raw-load.la -rpath /usr/local/lib/gegl-0.4 raw_load_la-raw-load.lo -L/usr/local/lib -Wl,--export-dynamic -lgmodule-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -ljson-glib-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lgthread-2.0 -pthread -lglib-2.0 -lintl  -lm -L/usr/local/lib -lbabl-0.1  ../../gegl/libgegl-0.4.la -L/usr/local/lib -lraw -fopenmp -llcms2  -L/usr/local/lib
